steps.title: Identify the student's claim
steps.content: The second student claims congestion affected smaller areas and also worsened in a very large city. To support that claim, the data must show traffic delay increasing over time in each of the three urban areas shown.

steps.title: Avoid single-point data
steps.content: Choice B gives only one low data point, Choice C compares two areas without showing worsening over time, and Choice D gives one New York City value from 1992. The supporting data must show greater delay in 2000 than in 1990 for all three areas. The answer is A.
